scenarios.expected: both real MQTT 3.1.1 clients reconnect and recover subscriptions
scenarios.observed: Mosquitto restarts once and the Edge flow continues on a new connection

scenarios.expected: MQTT PUBACK does not delete the spool and identical business identity replays
scenarios.observed: one FileCloudLinkSpool record survives the lost application ACK and replays in the second Edge process

scenarios.expected: Cloud returns its durable stream, epoch, and position tuple
scenarios.observed: the second Edge process receives manifest/1/1 while telemetry/1/1 still replays after its lost ACK

scenarios.expected: a second Edge OS process recovers the retained file-spool record
scenarios.observed: phase two reopens the phase-one journal with one pending record

scenarios.expected: without a production durable store, continuity remains unknown
scenarios.observed: the new Cloud process detects session-epoch rollback and re-accepts the replay as unknown

scenarios.expected: repeated QoS 1 payload does not create a second business fact
scenarios.observed: the same position, batch, and digest return the same logical receipt

scenarios.expected: the application accepts an idempotent replay
scenarios.observed: the repository reports replay and emits an unsigned application ACK

scenarios.expected: the application emits neither receipt nor ACK
scenarios.observed: the changed binding and digest are rejected and Edge times out waiting for ACK

scenarios.expected: loss is an explicit application fact and never a silent cursor jump
scenarios.observed: one data-loss fact receives its own unsigned application ACK

scenarios.expected: retain the gap without advancing a cumulative Edge cursor
scenarios.observed: the repository returns a gap receipt and Cloud emits no ACK

scenarios.expected: evaluation time greater than or equal to expiry rejects before persistence
scenarios.observed: ingress returns message-expired and publishes no ACK

scenarios.expected: a non-durable buffered result never creates an application ACK
scenarios.observed: durablyAcknowledged=false and Edge receives no ACK
